rules.cssText: .styleguide_nav_wrap { order: 0; max-height: none; position: relative; top: 0px; }
.nav_menu_scroll { flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; min-height: calc(-70px + 100svh); max-height: calc(-70px + 100svh); display: flex; }
.nav_component { flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; display: flex; }

.footer_grid { column-gap: var(--_spacing---space--8); row-gap: var(--_spacing---space--8); flex-flow: column; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: flex; }

.slide_wrapper { padding: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-l\<deleted\|variable-bb2d43fb-349e-c28e-e594-6daad1d2702c\>); column-gap: var(--_spacing---space--9); row-gap: var(--_spacing---space--9); flex-flow: wrap-reverse; height: auto; }
.tabs_menu.cc-alt { scrollbar-width: none; justify-content: flex-start; align-self: flex-start; align-items: center; overflow: auto; }
.logo_strip { flex: 0 1 auto; justify-content: center; align-items: center; }
.orbit_circle.cc-2 { width: var(--column-width--10); height: var(--column-width--10); display: none; }
.launch_hero_card_wrapper { padding-right: var(--size--2rem); padding-left: calc((100vw - var(--container--main))/2); align-items: stretch; width: 100%; overflow: scroll; }
.launch_hero_explore { max-width: var(--container--main); margin: var(--_spacing---space--1)auto var(--size--1rem); text-align: left; flex-flow: row; width: 100%; }
.newsletter_content_wrap { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; display: flex; }
.newsletter_btn_main_wrap { padding-right: var(--size--1-5rem); padding-left: var(--size--1-5rem); border-radius: var(--radius--small); }
.tabs_menu-2.cc-alt { scrollbar-width: none; justify-content: flex-start; align-self: flex-start; align-items: center; overflow: auto; }

.u-hflex-between-center.u-width-full.u-max-width-30ch:where(.w-variant-09ef868d-ec23-1553-cf01-d5a31bc64ebd), .u-hflex-between-center.u-width-full.u-max-width-30ch.featured-29 { column-gap: var(--size--1rem); row-gap: var(--size--1rem); justify-content: flex-start; align-self: flex-start; align-items: center; }
.accordion_icon_right { align-items: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; display: flex; }
.article-list-item:where(.w-variant-09ef868d-ec23-1553-cf01-d5a31bc64ebd) { column-gap: var(--size--0-5rem); row-gap: var(--size--0-5rem); flex-flow: column; }
.article-list-item.cc-event { column-gap: var(--size--2rem); row-gap: var(--size--0-5rem); flex-flow: column; display: flex; }

.article-list-item.u-detail-m.featured, .article-list-item.cc-featured, .article-list-item.featured-8, .article-list-item.featured-15, .article-list-item.featured-22 { column-gap: var(--size--0-5rem); row-gap: var(--size--0-5rem); flex-flow: column; }
.model_family_grid { flex-flow: column; margin-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; display: flex; }
.event_list_item { column-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-xs); row-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-xs); flex-flow: wrap; }
.event_list_item_body { column-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-xs); row-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-xs); flex-flow: wrap; }
.launch_hero_card { column-gap: var(--_spacing---space--1); row-gap: var(--_spacing---space--1); width: 300px; height: 100%; padding: 2rem 3rem; }
.try_claude_mobile { column-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-s); row-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-s); flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; display: flex; }
.claude_prompt_tabs { max-width: var(--container--main); justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; width: 100%; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
.try_claude_heading { justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; min-height: 7em; display: flex; }
.finance_testimonial_slide { width: var(--column-width--11); aspect-ratio: auto; border-radius: var(--radius--main); max-height: none; }
.mars-cta_title { max-width: 60vw; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; font-size: 10vw; }
.claude_code-cta_title-sr { max-width: 60vw; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; font-size: 10vw; }
.nav_actions_wrap.is-desktop { flex-flow: row; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; }
.footer_bottom_contain { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.article-list-item:where(.w-variant-f9a8452b-5f74-e665-21ee-52dc9b70f4b6), .article-list-item.cc-event { column-gap: var(--size--1rem); row-gap: var(--size--1rem); flex-flow: wrap; }
.slide_wrapper { column-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-m); row-gap: var(--_spacing---gap--gap-m); border-radius: var(--radius--main); }
.newsletter_btn_main_wrap { padding-right: var(--size--0rem); padding-left: var(--size--0rem); width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; }
.slider_arrow_wrapper { justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; position: absolute; inset: auto 0% 0%; }

customProperties.--grid-breakout: [full-start] minmax(0, 1fr) [content-start] repeat(12, minmax(0, calc((calc(min(89.5rem, 100vw) - clamp(2rem, 1.0816326530612246rem + 3.9183673469387754vw, 5rem) * 2) - calc(clamp(1.75rem, 1.6734693877551021rem + 0.326530612244898vw, 2rem) * (12 - 1))) / 12))) [content-end] minmax(0, 1fr) [full-end]
